business.name: Signalia
business.description: Tech consulting — Digital visibility + AI automation for local businesses in Mexico City

hero.subtitle: We make sure customers find you on Google and your business runs on its own. Digital visibility + AI automation for local businesses in Mexico City.

demo.label: We show you how many clients you're losing today

services.label: Our services
services.subtitle: The Signalia name splits into two units that cover exactly what your business needs today.

signal.label: Signal
signal.title: Local Visibility
signal.description: Your business appears first on Google when someone searches for what you sell. Optimized profile, managed reviews, weekly posts that attract real customers.

alia.label: Alia
alia.title: AI Automation
alia.description: We eliminate the tasks that waste your time and don't make you money. Automated flows for customer service, inventory, follow-ups, and reports that work on their own.

process.label: How it works
process.title: From first call to measurable results
process.subtitle: No jargon, no long contracts, no surprises. It's that simple to get started.

audit.title: 10-minute audit
audit.description: We show you in a quick video call how your business looks on Google today versus the competition. No commitment, no cost.

plan.title: Custom plan
plan.description: We create a specific action plan for your business with clear goals, defined timelines, and results you can measure every week.

results.title: Visible results
results.description: We execute, measure, and adjust. You receive monthly reports with clear numbers: more searches, more clicks, more clients, fewer wasted hours.

results.label: Real results
results.title: Numbers that speak for themselves

searches.label: of local searches end up on the Google profile — not the website

margin.label: operating margin — digital service with no inventory costs

results.quote: “Your Google profile is your digital storefront. We’re going to make it irresistible.”

pricing.label: Plans & pricing
pricing.title: Clear investment, measurable results
pricing.subtitle: No fine print, no surprises. All plans include monthly reports with real metrics.

items.question: How soon will I see results?
items.answer: With Signal, changes to your Google profile are visible within 48 hours. The real impact on searches and clicks shows in the first 2–4 weeks. With Alia, automated workflows are operational from the first week.

items.question: Do I need to know about technology?
items.answer: No. We handle everything technical. You just need to give us access to your accounts and 10 minutes for the initial audit. Signalia works as your tech partner — you focus on your business.

items.question: What if I don't have a Google Business profile?
items.answer: We create it from scratch. Activation includes the complete creation of your profile with full optimization from day one. You don't need anything prior.

items.question: Is there a minimum commitment?
items.answer: No. Our monthly services come with no lock-in contract. We're confident the results speak for themselves. If at any point you decide to pause, you can do so without penalty.

items.question: Which areas of Mexico City do you cover?
items.answer: We primarily work with businesses in Polanco, Condesa, Roma, Coyoacán, Del Valle, and Santa Fe. If your business is in another area of CDMX, reach out — we can probably help.

items.question: Do you also work in English?
items.answer: Yes! We work with international businesses in Mexico City — franchises, boutique hotels, and restaurants with foreign clients. Communication and reports can be fully in English.

cta.label: Ready to grow?
